questions.questionText: Find the next number in the series: 5, 8, 11, 14, 17, ?
questions.explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 3. Therefore the next term is 17 + 3 = 20.

questions.questionText: An article costs Rs. 210 and is sold at a profit of 9%. Find the selling price.
questions.explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 210 x 109/100 = Rs. 229.

questions.questionText: Choose the closest meaning of the word "RESILIENT".
questions.explanation: "resilient" most closely means "able to recover" in placement verbal ability contexts.

questions.questionText: A can finish a task in 18 days and B can finish it in 18 days. What is their combined one-day work?
questions.explanation: A's work per day is 1/18 and B's is 1/18. Together = 1/18 + 1/18 = 36/324.
